description: Canonical lead JSON structure for the education partnership lead dashboard.

field_notes.business_name: Company, school, operator, or agency name.
field_notes.email: General or public business emails; separate multiple values with semicolons.
field_notes.instagram: Instagram URL(s); separate multiple values with semicolons.
field_notes.linkedin_company_url: Verified or scraped LinkedIn company page URL(s).
field_notes.linkedin_person_url: Verified or scraped personal LinkedIn profile URL(s), not guessed.
field_notes.linkedin_source: Where LinkedIn was found, such as Apify contact scraping or official website.
field_notes.decision_maker_name: Verified person name(s), blank if not source-backed.
field_notes.decision_maker_email: Public or source-backed direct/role email, blank if not verified.
field_notes.decision_maker_phone: Public direct route or company route tied to the decision-maker source.
field_notes.decision_source_type: Official website, Companies House, GOV.UK, education press, etc.
field_notes.score: Lead fit score as a number or numeric string.
field_notes.google_maps_url: Google Maps source URL when available.
